### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2 HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connect-Timeout-Ms: 180000
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.11
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842195278606858022
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom datetime import datetime\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional\r\n\r\nimport redis.asyncio as redis\r\nfrom fastapi import Depends, FastAPI, HTTPException, Query, status\r\nfrom fastapi.responses import JSONResponse, PlainTextResponse\r\nfrom prometheus_client import CONTENT_TYPE_LATEST, generate_latest\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\r\nfrom sqlalchemy import and_, func, select\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .broker import enqueue_job, get_redis\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .db import get_session, init_db\r\nfrom .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobEvent, JobState\r\nfrom .state_machine import InvalidStateTransition, transition_state\r\n\r\n\r\nlogger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"api\")\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobCreate(BaseModel):\r\n    type: str\r\n    payload: Dict[str, Any]\r\n    queue: str = \"default\"\r\n    max_attempts: int = Field(3, gt=0)\r\n    run_at: Optional[datetime] = None\r\n    idempotency_key: Optional[str] = None\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobResponse(BaseModel):\r\n    id: str\r\n    type: str\r\n    queue: str\r\n    payload: Dict[str, Any]\r\n    state: JobState\r\n    created_at: datetime\r\n    updated_at: datetime\r\n    idempotency_key: Optional[str]\r\n    attempts: int\r\n    max_attempts: int\r\n    next_run_at: Optional[datetime]\r\n    schedule: Optional[str]\r\n    last_error: Optional[str]\r\n    result: Optional[Dict[str, Any]]\r\n    is_enqueued: bool\r\n    cancel_requested: bool\r\n\r\n    @classmethod\r\n    def from_model(cls, job: Job) -> \"JobResponse\":\r\n        return cls(\r\n            id=job.id,\r\n            type=job.type,\r\n            queue=job.queue,\r\n            payload=job.payload,\r\n            state=job.state,\r\n            created_at=job.created_at,\r\n            updated_at=job.updated_at,\r\n            idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n            attempts=job.attempts,\r\n            max_attempts=job.max_attempts,\r\n            next_run_at=job.next_run_at,\r\n            schedule=job.schedule,\r\n            last_error=job.last_error,\r\n            result=job.result,\r\n            is_enqueued=job.is_enqueued,\r\n            cancel_requested=job.cancel_requested,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobCreateResponse(BaseModel):\r\n    job_id: str\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobListResponse(BaseModel):\r\n    items: List[JobResponse]\r\n    next_cursor: Optional[int]\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobEventResponse(BaseModel):\r\n    id: int\r\n    job_id: str\r\n    ts: datetime\r\n    old_state: Optional[JobState]\r\n    new_state: JobState\r\n    message: str\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any]\r\n\r\n    @classmethod\r\n    def from_model(cls, ev: JobEvent) -> \"JobEventResponse\":\r\n        return cls(\r\n            id=ev.id,\r\n            job_id=ev.job_id,\r\n            ts=ev.ts,\r\n            old_state=ev.old_state,\r\n            new_state=ev.new_state,\r\n            message=ev.message,\r\n            metadata=ev.data,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef create_app() -> FastAPI:\r\n    app = FastAPI(title=\"MiniQueue API\")\r\n    configure_logging(service=\"api\")\r\n\r\n    @app.on_event(\"startup\")\r\n    async def _startup() -> None:  # pragma: no cover - simple wiring\r\n        await init_db()\r\n\r\n    @app.post(\"/jobs\", response_model=JobCreateResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)\r\n    async def create_job(\r\n        req: JobCreate,\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobCreateResponse:\r\n        # Idempotency: return existing non-terminal job with same key.\r\n        if req.idempotency_key:\r\n            stmt = select(Job).where(\r\n                and_(\r\n                    Job.idempotency_key == req.idempotency_key,\r\n                    Job.state.in_([JobState.QUEUED, JobState.RUNNING]),\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n            existing = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\r\n            if existing:\r\n                return JobCreateResponse(job_id=existing.id)\r\n\r\n        job = Job(\r\n            type=req.type,\r\n            queue=req.queue,\r\n            payload=req.payload,\r\n            max_attempts=req.max_attempts,\r\n            idempotency_key=req.idempotency_key,\r\n            state=JobState.QUEUED,\r\n            is_enqueued=False,\r\n            next_run_at=req.run_at,\r\n        )\r\n        session.add(job)\r\n        await session.flush()\r\n\r\n        if req.run_at is None:\r\n            await enqueue_job(\r\n                job_id=job.id,\r\n                job_type=job.type,\r\n                queue=job.queue,\r\n                idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n            )\r\n            job.is_enqueued = True\r\n            JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL.labels(type=job.type, queue=job.queue).inc()\r\n\r\n        await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job created\")\r\n\r\n        return JobCreateResponse(job_id=job.id)\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/jobs/{job_id}\", response_model=JobResponse)\r\n    async def get_job(\r\n        job_id: str,\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobResponse:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Job not found\")\r\n        return JobResponse.from_model(job)\r\n\r\n    @app.post(\"/jobs/{job_id}/cancel\", response_model=JobResponse)\r\n    async def cancel_job(\r\n        job_id: str,\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobResponse:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Job not found\")\r\n\r\n        if job.state == JobState.RUNNING:\r\n            job.cancel_requested = True\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"Cancel requested\")\r\n        elif job.state == JobState.QUEUED:\r\n            # For not-yet-enqueued jobs we can safely mark CANCELED; for already enqueued,\r\n            # workers will observe cancel_requested before execution.\r\n            if not job.is_enqueued:\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.CANCELED, \"Job canceled before enqueue\")\r\n            else:\r\n                job.cancel_requested = True\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Cancel requested while queued\")\r\n        else:\r\n            # Other states are treated as no-op.\r\n            pass\r\n\r\n        await session.flush()\r\n        return JobResponse.from_model(job)\r\n\r\n    @app.post(\"/jobs/{job_id}/retry\", response_model=JobResponse)\r\n    async def retry_job(\r\n        job_id: str,\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobResponse:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Job not found\")\r\n\r\n        if job.state not in {JobState.FAILED, JobState.DEAD}:\r\n            raise HTTPException(\r\n                status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,\r\n                detail=\"Retry only allowed for FAILED or DEAD jobs\",\r\n            )\r\n\r\n        job.state = JobState.QUEUED\r\n        job.attempts = 0\r\n        job.last_error = None\r\n        job.next_run_at = None\r\n        job.is_enqueued = True\r\n        await enqueue_job(\r\n            job_id=job.id,\r\n            job_type=job.type,\r\n            queue=job.queue,\r\n            idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n        )\r\n        JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL.labels(type=job.type, queue=job.queue).inc()\r\n        await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job retried\")\r\n        await session.flush()\r\n        return JobResponse.from_model(job)\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/jobs\", response_model=JobListResponse)\r\n    async def list_jobs(\r\n        state: Optional[JobState] = Query(default=None),\r\n        type: Optional[str] = Query(default=None, alias=\"type\"),\r\n        limit: int = Query(default=50, ge=1, le=200),\r\n        cursor: Optional[int] = Query(default=None),\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobListResponse:\r\n        offset = cursor or 0\r\n\r\n        stmt = select(Job).order_by(Job.created_at.desc(), Job.id.desc())\r\n        if state is not None:\r\n            stmt = stmt.where(Job.state == state)\r\n        if type is not None:\r\n            stmt = stmt.where(Job.type == type)\r\n        stmt = stmt.limit(limit).offset(offset)\r\n\r\n        result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n        jobs = list(result.scalars())\r\n        next_cursor = offset + len(jobs) if len(jobs) == limit else None\r\n        return JobListResponse(\r\n            items=[JobResponse.from_model(j) for j in jobs],\r\n            next_cursor=next_cursor,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/jobs/{job_id}/events\", response_model=List[JobEventResponse])\r\n    async def get_job_events(\r\n        job_id: str,\r\n        limit: int = Query(default=100, ge=1, le=500),\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> List[JobEventResponse]:\r\n        stmt = (\r\n            select(JobEvent)\r\n            .where(JobEvent.job_id == job_id)\r\n            .order_by(JobEvent.ts.asc(), JobEvent.id.asc())\r\n            .limit(limit)\r\n        )\r\n        result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n        events = list(result.scalars())\r\n        return [JobEventResponse.from_model(ev) for ev in events]\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/job_events\", response_model=List[JobEventResponse])\r\n    async def tail_job_events(\r\n        since: Optional[datetime] = Query(default=None),\r\n        limit: int = Query(default=100, ge=1, le=500),\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> List[JobEventResponse]:\r\n        stmt = select(JobEvent)\r\n        if since is not None:\r\n            stmt = stmt.where(JobEvent.ts >= since)\r\n        stmt = stmt.order_by(JobEvent.ts.asc(), JobEvent.id.asc()).limit(limit)\r\n        result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n        events = list(result.scalars())\r\n        return [JobEventResponse.from_model(ev) for ev in events]\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/metrics\")\r\n    async def metrics() -> PlainTextResponse:\r\n        data = generate_latest()\r\n        return PlainTextResponse(data.decode(\"utf-8\"), media_type=CONTENT_TYPE_LATEST)\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/healthz\")\r\n    async def healthz(\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JSONResponse:\r\n        redis_ok = False\r\n        db_ok = False\r\n\r\n        try:\r\n            client = get_redis()\r\n            pong = await client.ping()\r\n            redis_ok = bool(pong)\r\n        except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n            logger.exception(\"Redis health check failed\")\r\n\r\n        try:\r\n            await session.execute(select(func.count(Job.id)).limit(1))\r\n            db_ok = True\r\n        except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n            logger.exception(\"DB health check failed\")\r\n\r\n        status_str = \"ok\" if (redis_ok and db_ok) else \"degraded\"\r\n        return JSONResponse(\r\n            {\r\n                \"status\": status_str,\r\n                \"redis\": redis_ok,\r\n                \"db\": db_ok,\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    return app\r\n\r\n\r\napp = create_app()\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "ccda139b6e8e1665357640e65dfa03fd7a02930e29fb93d819008e6c4b28e8d0",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, Optional\r\n\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobEvent, JobState\r\n\r\n\r\nclass InvalidStateTransition(Exception):\r\n    pass\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def _record_event(\r\n    session: AsyncSession,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    old: Optional[JobState],\r\n    new: JobState,\r\n    message: str,\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    event = JobEvent(\r\n        job_id=job.id,\r\n        old_state=old,\r\n        new_state=new,\r\n        message=message,\r\n        data=metadata or {},\r\n    )\r\n    session.add(event)\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def transition_state(\r\n    session: AsyncSession,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    new_state: JobState,\r\n    message: str,\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Validate and perform a state transition, recording a JobEvent.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    old = job.state\r\n\r\n    if not _is_valid_transition(old, new_state):\r\n        raise InvalidStateTransition(f\"Cannot transition {old} -> {new_state}\")\r\n\r\n    job.state = new_state\r\n    job.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\r\n    await _record_event(session, job, old, new_state, message, metadata)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _is_valid_transition(old: JobState, new: JobState) -> bool:\r\n    if old == new:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old == JobState.QUEUED and new in {\r\n        JobState.RUNNING,\r\n        JobState.CANCELED,\r\n        JobState.DEAD,\r\n    }:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old == JobState.RUNNING and new in {\r\n        JobState.SUCCEEDED,\r\n        JobState.FAILED,\r\n        JobState.CANCELED,\r\n        JobState.DEAD,\r\n    }:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old in {JobState.FAILED, JobState.DEAD} and new == JobState.QUEUED:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    # Terminal states remain terminal\r\n    if old in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED}:\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    return False\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "8ef28544fe545fc52fe934595c8aff049f505f7a5b6f4b48e36a6ab0017470db",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway
Content-Type: text/html
Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 03:26:28 GMT
Server: awselb/2.0
```

```














<html>
  <head>
    <title>
      502 Bad Gateway
    </title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <center>
      <h1>
        502 Bad Gateway
      </h1>
    </center>
  </body>
</html>
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": {"1:I64": 4842195278606858022}, "2:LEN": "REDACTED", "6:VARINT": 4, "7:LEN": [{"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom datetime import datetime\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional\r\n\r\nimport redis.asyncio as redis\r\nfrom fastapi import Depends, FastAPI, HTTPException, Query, status\r\nfrom fastapi.responses import JSONResponse, PlainTextResponse\r\nfrom prometheus_client import CONTENT_TYPE_LATEST, generate_latest\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\r\nfrom sqlalchemy import and_, func, select\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .broker import enqueue_job, get_redis\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .db import get_session, init_db\r\nfrom .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobEvent, JobState\r\nfrom .state_machine import InvalidStateTransition, transition_state\r\n\r\n\r\nlogger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"api\")\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobCreate(BaseModel):\r\n    type: str\r\n    payload: Dict[str, Any]\r\n    queue: str = \"default\"\r\n    max_attempts: int = Field(3, gt=0)\r\n    run_at: Optional[datetime] = None\r\n    idempotency_key: Optional[str] = None\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobResponse(BaseModel):\r\n    id: str\r\n    type: str\r\n    queue: str\r\n    payload: Dict[str, Any]\r\n    state: JobState\r\n    created_at: datetime\r\n    updated_at: datetime\r\n    idempotency_key: Optional[str]\r\n    attempts: int\r\n    max_attempts: int\r\n    next_run_at: Optional[datetime]\r\n    schedule: Optional[str]\r\n    last_error: Optional[str]\r\n    result: Optional[Dict[str, Any]]\r\n    is_enqueued: bool\r\n    cancel_requested: bool\r\n\r\n    @classmethod\r\n    def from_model(cls, job: Job) -> \"JobResponse\":\r\n        return cls(\r\n            id=job.id,\r\n            type=job.type,\r\n            queue=job.queue,\r\n            payload=job.payload,\r\n            state=job.state,\r\n            created_at=job.created_at,\r\n            updated_at=job.updated_at,\r\n            idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n            attempts=job.attempts,\r\n            max_attempts=job.max_attempts,\r\n            next_run_at=job.next_run_at,\r\n            schedule=job.schedule,\r\n            last_error=job.last_error,\r\n            result=job.result,\r\n            is_enqueued=job.is_enqueued,\r\n            cancel_requested=job.cancel_requested,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobCreateResponse(BaseModel):\r\n    job_id: str\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobListResponse(BaseModel):\r\n    items: List[JobResponse]\r\n    next_cursor: Optional[int]\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobEventResponse(BaseModel):\r\n    id: int\r\n    job_id: str\r\n    ts: datetime\r\n    old_state: Optional[JobState]\r\n    new_state: JobState\r\n    message: str\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any]\r\n\r\n    @classmethod\r\n    def from_model(cls, ev: JobEvent) -> \"JobEventResponse\":\r\n        return cls(\r\n            id=ev.id,\r\n            job_id=ev.job_id,\r\n            ts=ev.ts,\r\n            old_state=ev.old_state,\r\n            new_state=ev.new_state,\r\n            message=ev.message,\r\n            metadata=ev.data,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef create_app() -> FastAPI:\r\n    app = FastAPI(title=\"MiniQueue API\")\r\n    configure_logging(service=\"api\")\r\n\r\n    @app.on_event(\"startup\")\r\n    async def _startup() -> None:  # pragma: no cover - simple wiring\r\n        await init_db()\r\n\r\n    @app.post(\"/jobs\", response_model=JobCreateResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)\r\n    async def create_job(\r\n        req: JobCreate,\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobCreateResponse:\r\n        # Idempotency: return existing non-terminal job with same key.\r\n        if req.idempotency_key:\r\n            stmt = select(Job).where(\r\n                and_(\r\n                    Job.idempotency_key == req.idempotency_key,\r\n                    Job.state.in_([JobState.QUEUED, JobState.RUNNING]),\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n            existing = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\r\n            if existing:\r\n                return JobCreateResponse(job_id=existing.id)\r\n\r\n        job = Job(\r\n            type=req.type,\r\n            queue=req.queue,\r\n            payload=req.payload,\r\n            max_attempts=req.max_attempts,\r\n            idempotency_key=req.idempotency_key,\r\n            state=JobState.QUEUED,\r\n            is_enqueued=False,\r\n            next_run_at=req.run_at,\r\n        )\r\n        session.add(job)\r\n        await session.flush()\r\n\r\n        if req.run_at is None:\r\n            await enqueue_job(\r\n                job_id=job.id,\r\n                job_type=job.type,\r\n                queue=job.queue,\r\n                idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n            )\r\n            job.is_enqueued = True\r\n            JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL.labels(type=job.type, queue=job.queue).inc()\r\n\r\n        await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job created\")\r\n\r\n        return JobCreateResponse(job_id=job.id)\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/jobs/{job_id}\", response_model=JobResponse)\r\n    async def get_job(\r\n        job_id: str,\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobResponse:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Job not found\")\r\n        return JobResponse.from_model(job)\r\n\r\n    @app.post(\"/jobs/{job_id}/cancel\", response_model=JobResponse)\r\n    async def cancel_job(\r\n        job_id: str,\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobResponse:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Job not found\")\r\n\r\n        if job.state == JobState.RUNNING:\r\n            job.cancel_requested = True\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"Cancel requested\")\r\n        elif job.state == JobState.QUEUED:\r\n            # For not-yet-enqueued jobs we can safely mark CANCELED; for already enqueued,\r\n            # workers will observe cancel_requested before execution.\r\n            if not job.is_enqueued:\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.CANCELED, \"Job canceled before enqueue\")\r\n            else:\r\n                job.cancel_requested = True\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Cancel requested while queued\")\r\n        else:\r\n            # Other states are treated as no-op.\r\n            pass\r\n\r\n        await session.flush()\r\n        return JobResponse.from_model(job)\r\n\r\n    @app.post(\"/jobs/{job_id}/retry\", response_model=JobResponse)\r\n    async def retry_job(\r\n        job_id: str,\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobResponse:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Job not found\")\r\n\r\n        if job.state not in {JobState.FAILED, JobState.DEAD}:\r\n            raise HTTPException(\r\n                status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,\r\n                detail=\"Retry only allowed for FAILED or DEAD jobs\",\r\n            )\r\n\r\n        job.state = JobState.QUEUED\r\n        job.attempts = 0\r\n        job.last_error = None\r\n        job.next_run_at = None\r\n        job.is_enqueued = True\r\n        await enqueue_job(\r\n            job_id=job.id,\r\n            job_type=job.type,\r\n            queue=job.queue,\r\n            idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n        )\r\n        JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL.labels(type=job.type, queue=job.queue).inc()\r\n        await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job retried\")\r\n        await session.flush()\r\n        return JobResponse.from_model(job)\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/jobs\", response_model=JobListResponse)\r\n    async def list_jobs(\r\n        state: Optional[JobState] = Query(default=None),\r\n        type: Optional[str] = Query(default=None, alias=\"type\"),\r\n        limit: int = Query(default=50, ge=1, le=200),\r\n        cursor: Optional[int] = Query(default=None),\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobListResponse:\r\n        offset = cursor or 0\r\n\r\n        stmt = select(Job).order_by(Job.created_at.desc(), Job.id.desc())\r\n        if state is not None:\r\n            stmt = stmt.where(Job.state == state)\r\n        if type is not None:\r\n            stmt = stmt.where(Job.type == type)\r\n        stmt = stmt.limit(limit).offset(offset)\r\n\r\n        result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n        jobs = list(result.scalars())\r\n        next_cursor = offset + len(jobs) if len(jobs) == limit else None\r\n        return JobListResponse(\r\n            items=[JobResponse.from_model(j) for j in jobs],\r\n            next_cursor=next_cursor,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/jobs/{job_id}/events\", response_model=List[JobEventResponse])\r\n    async def get_job_events(\r\n        job_id: str,\r\n        limit: int = Query(default=100, ge=1, le=500),\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> List[JobEventResponse]:\r\n        stmt = (\r\n            select(JobEvent)\r\n            .where(JobEvent.job_id == job_id)\r\n            .order_by(JobEvent.ts.asc(), JobEvent.id.asc())\r\n            .limit(limit)\r\n        )\r\n        result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n        events = list(result.scalars())\r\n        return [JobEventResponse.from_model(ev) for ev in events]\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/job_events\", response_model=List[JobEventResponse])\r\n    async def tail_job_events(\r\n        since: Optional[datetime] = Query(default=None),\r\n        limit: int = Query(default=100, ge=1, le=500),\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> List[JobEventResponse]:\r\n        stmt = select(JobEvent)\r\n        if since is not None:\r\n            stmt = stmt.where(JobEvent.ts >= since)\r\n        stmt = stmt.order_by(JobEvent.ts.asc(), JobEvent.id.asc()).limit(limit)\r\n        result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n        events = list(result.scalars())\r\n        return [JobEventResponse.from_model(ev) for ev in events]\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/metrics\")\r\n    async def metrics() -> PlainTextResponse:\r\n        data = generate_latest()\r\n        return PlainTextResponse(data.decode(\"utf-8\"), media_type=CONTENT_TYPE_LATEST)\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/healthz\")\r\n    async def healthz(\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JSONResponse:\r\n        redis_ok = False\r\n        db_ok = False\r\n\r\n        try:\r\n            client = get_redis()\r\n            pong = await client.ping()\r\n            redis_ok = bool(pong)\r\n        except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n            logger.exception(\"Redis health check failed\")\r\n\r\n        try:\r\n            await session.execute(select(func.count(Job.id)).limit(1))\r\n            db_ok = True\r\n        except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n            logger.exception(\"DB health check failed\")\r\n\r\n        status_str = \"ok\" if (redis_ok and db_ok) else \"degraded\"\r\n        return JSONResponse(\r\n            {\r\n                \"status\": status_str,\r\n                \"redis\": redis_ok,\r\n                \"db\": db_ok,\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    return app\r\n\r\n\r\napp = create_app()\r\n\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "ccda139b6e8e1665357640e65dfa03fd7a02930e29fb93d819008e6c4b28e8d0", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, Optional\r\n\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobEvent, JobState\r\n\r\n\r\nclass InvalidStateTransition(Exception):\r\n    pass\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def _record_event(\r\n    session: AsyncSession,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    old: Optional[JobState],\r\n    new: JobState,\r\n    message: str,\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    event = JobEvent(\r\n        job_id=job.id,\r\n        old_state=old,\r\n        new_state=new,\r\n        message=message,\r\n        data=metadata or {},\r\n    )\r\n    session.add(event)\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def transition_state(\r\n    session: AsyncSession,\r\n    job: Job,\r\n    new_state: JobState,\r\n    message: str,\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any] | None = None,\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Validate and perform a state transition, recording a JobEvent.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    old = job.state\r\n\r\n    if not _is_valid_transition(old, new_state):\r\n        raise InvalidStateTransition(f\"Cannot transition {old} -> {new_state}\")\r\n\r\n    job.state = new_state\r\n    job.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)\r\n    await _record_event(session, job, old, new_state, message, metadata)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _is_valid_transition(old: JobState, new: JobState) -> bool:\r\n    if old == new:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old == JobState.QUEUED and new in {\r\n        JobState.RUNNING,\r\n        JobState.CANCELED,\r\n        JobState.DEAD,\r\n    }:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old == JobState.RUNNING and new in {\r\n        JobState.SUCCEEDED,\r\n        JobState.FAILED,\r\n        JobState.CANCELED,\r\n        JobState.DEAD,\r\n    }:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    if old in {JobState.FAILED, JobState.DEAD} and new == JobState.QUEUED:\r\n        return True\r\n\r\n    # Terminal states remain terminal\r\n    if old in {JobState.SUCCEEDED, JobState.CANCELED}:\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    return False\r\n\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "8ef28544fe545fc52fe934595c8aff049f505f7a5b6f4b48e36a6ab0017470db", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}]}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2
```
